Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR JUDICIAL APPROVAL OF CONSENT JUDGMENT WITH POPCHIPS, INC.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Good cause has been shown for the requested judicial approval. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Notice Of Motion For Judicial Approval Of Consent Judgment With Popchips, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Continued To Jan-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EX REL. Notice Of Motion For Judicial Approval Of Consent Judgment With Popchips, Inc.
Judge Miller recuses herself. The matter is continued to January 6, 2012 when Judge Kahn will be presiding in Department 302. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
